title: Settings parity with OSS subscription-tab repurpose
description: Repurpose subscription tab for self-hosted OSS diagnostics/version/sponsorship while preserving settings UX.

title: Settings UI: self-host section map and data controls
description: Implement settings section structure with self-host appropriate controls (data import/export, integrations, profile/prefs) and explicit non-SaaS fallbacks.

title: Improve AI processing recall using backup training data
description: Debug AI processing recall issues and use backup_2026-02-26_00-00-03.db as training/reference data to improve retrieval quality. Document gaps and additional training data needs.
close_reason: Added backup-db-driven training priors for categorization and surfaced training status in AI settings.

title: Fix dashboard data loading and visualization rendering
description: Investigate and fix why dashboard data is not showing and visualizations are empty. Ensure charts render with real data paths and add regression coverage.
close_reason: Fixed dashboard empty-state handling with automatic all-range fallback and trend empty-state rendering.

title: Transactions API parity (type/tag/review/recurring link)
description: Extend transaction contracts and APIs for tags, type, review status, and recurring linkage.

title: Transactions API: create/update validation contract
description: Define and implement strict input validation and normalized persistence for transaction create/update, including type/category/tag constraints and response envelope consistency.

title: Transactions API: bulk mutation endpoints
description: Add bulk mutation support for review state updates, category/tag batch edits, and safe multi-record updates with idempotent semantics.

title: Test: capture Copilot-style layout parity for investments frontend
description: Create visual/structural tests for the investments experience to compare key layout regions against the Copilot-style target: sidebar hierarchy, chart cards, metrics panel, spacing rhythm, and typography scale. Use deterministic fixtures/snapshots so regressions are detectable before UI refactors.
close_reason: Added investments layout parity Playwright coverage with structural assertions and screenshot snapshot baseline.

title: Update transaction processing for two-category system
description: Update transaction processing so parsing, normalization, categorization, and downstream aggregates align with the new coarse/granular category model and default strategy configuration from minance2-tb6 and minance2-1vs.
acceptance_criteria: Transaction processing correctly applies coarse/granular category mapping defaults and user overrides, with outputs consistent across investigation and visualization flows.
close_reason: Implemented coarse/granular category strategy, Auto/Jeep/Honda handling, transaction-processing integration, visualization updates, and emoji category support with tests.

title: Investments schema + portfolio engine + CSV/manual ingestion
description: Build full investments backend model, valuation pipeline, and ingestion (manual + CSV).

title: Investments domain: holdings/positions performance model
description: Implement holdings, positions, and performance data model with deterministic calculations and support for CSV/manual ingestion sources.

title: Add default coarse/granular category settings from Copilot strategy
description: Use https://imgur.com/a/copilot-categorization-strategy-Ut9IGEv as the default category strategy for the two-level system. Allow users to modify the default mappings/settings in-app.
acceptance_criteria: Default mapping is preloaded from the referenced strategy and users can edit/override category settings.
close_reason: Implemented coarse/granular category strategy, Auto/Jeep/Honda handling, transaction-processing integration, visualization updates, and emoji category support with tests.

title: Accounts API parity + account settings behavior
description: Implement account CRUD plus settings for chart inclusion, hide/close, and destructive actions.

title: Accounts API: create/update contract and validation parity
description: Implement accounts create/update contract with validation for account type/currency/initial balance semantics and stable response shapes.

title: Accounts API: balance history and manual adjustment endpoints
description: Add account balance history retrieval and manual adjustment endpoints with audit-friendly metadata and conflict-safe writes.

title: Refactor investments UI toward Copilot.money visual parity
description: Refactor the frontend migrated from ../minance/next-app so the investments screen matches the Copilot-style look and information architecture more closely (dark palette, navigation density, card structure, metrics grouping, and chart region composition) while preserving existing behavior. Tailwind + .tsx only. Acceptance: parity tests from minance2-147 are present and passing.
close_reason: Implemented new Copilot-style investments route and navigation wiring; parity tests passing.

title: Improve visualization functions for robustness and quality
description: Refactor and improve visualization helper functions to increase correctness, readability, and performance when aggregating and rendering expense category data.
acceptance_criteria: Visualization functions are simplified/improved with updated tests covering key aggregation and rendering behaviors.
close_reason: Implemented coarse/granular category strategy, Auto/Jeep/Honda handling, transaction-processing integration, visualization updates, and emoji category support with tests.

title: Test: reproduce AI Settings unusable interactions

close_reason: Implemented workflow guardrails by wiring frontend test-first guard into npm test and documenting the contributor rule.

title: Read OpenRouter API key from .env.local in dev settings

description: Implement categories CRUD with uniqueness rules, group/type constraints, and safe handling when categories are referenced by existing transactions.

title: Implement two-category expense investigation mode (coarse/granular)
description: Introduce a two-level categorization system so users can investigate expenses in either coarse or granular mode. Add a mode selector in the investigation UI and wire it through data aggregation. In this model, use Auto to represent Jeep and Honda spend.
acceptance_criteria: Users can switch between coarse and granular category views; expense investigation outputs update correctly for the selected mode. Auto category explicitly covers Jeep and Honda. Validate category coverage against backup_2026-02-26_00-00-03.db so categories account for all relevant transactions.
close_reason: Implemented coarse/granular category strategy, Auto/Jeep/Honda handling, transaction-processing integration, visualization updates, and emoji category support with tests.

title: Update visualizations for two-category expense modes
description: Revise charts and related visualization components so they render correctly for both coarse and granular category modes, including legends, labels, and interactions.
acceptance_criteria: All expense visualizations support both category modes and clearly indicate which mode is active.
close_reason: Implemented coarse/granular category strategy, Auto/Jeep/Honda handling, transaction-processing integration, visualization updates, and emoji category support with tests.

title: Parity Program: Copilot-style full-tab core
Parity capture: Categories tab behavior inventory
description: Use Playwright to document every Categories tab interaction in Copilot (list/group/type filters, create/edit/delete category, budget fields, edge states). Record expected request/response shapes, validation rules, and UI state transitions for implementation parity.

title: Add financial mutation safety guardrails
description: Specify and implement mutation safeguards: soft-delete or undo semantics where needed, idempotency keys for writes, and audit trail expectations for transaction/category/account changes in a self-host context.

title: Add API contract tests for parity-critical endpoints
description: Define and implement contract tests for categories, transactions, accounts, recurring, investments, and settings endpoints based on captured Copilot behavior to prevent regressions.

title: Accessibility and keyboard-nav parity audit
description: Audit major tabs for keyboard navigation, focus management, semantic labels, and form accessibility. Capture minimum parity baseline and required fixes for production readiness.

title: Self-host deployment profile (docker compose + env templates)
description: Define and document production-ready self-host deployment profile with compose stack, required env vars, sane defaults, and upgrade-safe configuration practices.

title: Backup/restore strategy for SQLite and uploads
description: Define automated backup and restore workflow for SQLite data and any uploaded artifacts, including verification drills and failure recovery steps.

title: Secrets management and rotation policy
description: Define secrets handling for self-host installs (storage, rotation cadence, startup validation, and incident recovery) without SaaS assumptions.

title: Observability baseline: logs, metrics, health checks
description: Implement baseline observability with structured logs, essential metrics, health/readiness endpoints, and alerting guidance for self-host operators.

title: Security hardening checklist for self-host runtime
description: Create and apply runtime hardening checklist covering auth/session settings, CSRF/CORS controls, rate limits, dependency updates, and secure defaults.

title: CSV import mapping wizard for transactions/accounts
description: Design and implement CSV import mapping for transactions and balances with preview, column mapping templates, validation errors, and dedupe safeguards.

title: Optional OFX/QFX ingestion adapter
description: Add optional ingestion adapter for OFX/QFX files for self-host users who lack direct bank integration; normalize into canonical import pipeline.

title: Parity capture: Transactions tab create/edit lifecycle
description: Use Playwright to map Transactions tab end-to-end: create manual transaction, edit, delete, transfer handling, review state, category/tag assignment, search/filter behavior, bulk actions, and error states. Produce implementation-ready acceptance criteria.

title: Reconciliation workflow and discrepancy resolution
description: Implement reconciliation workflow to compare imported balances/transactions against local ledger and resolve discrepancies safely.

title: Multi-currency support strategy and constraints
description: Define multi-currency handling scope, conversion data source assumptions, storage model, and UI display behavior for self-host deployments.

title: Timezone and day-boundary semantics for transaction dates
description: Define and enforce transaction date/day-boundary semantics across imports, recurring evaluation, and dashboard rollups to avoid off-by-one reporting errors.

title: Parity capture: Accounts tab onboarding + manual account flows
description: Use Playwright to inventory Accounts tab behaviors including account creation paths, manual account setup, account detail edits, balances, and any reconnect/error UX. Capture constraints and expected backend contracts.

title: Parity capture: Recurring tab rule lifecycle
description: Use Playwright to capture Recurring transaction rule lifecycle: creation, linking, pause/resume, archive, delete, and transaction association behavior. Document timing semantics and edge-case handling.

title: Parity capture: Dashboard + Investments interaction map
description: Use Playwright to capture Dashboard and Investments interactions, drill-down behavior, chart/state semantics, and empty/error/loading states. Produce parity notes that can be executed in open-source self-hosted constraints.

title: Define self-hosted feature matrix and fallbacks
description: Document which Copilot features can be reproduced directly, which need OSS-safe alternatives, and which should be explicitly scoped out. Include decisions for external service dependencies, secrets handling, and default self-host behavior.
close_reason: Added self-hosted feature matrix doc with explicit supported/fallback/scoped-out decisions and dependency policy.

title: Design account aggregation provider abstraction
description: Define a pluggable provider interface for account connectivity (self-host first), including local/manual import fallback, adapter boundaries, and failure handling so the app works without proprietary dependencies.

title: Design JSON-to-SQLite migration and rollback procedure
description: Create a deterministic migration plan from current JSON storage to SQLite with idempotent backfills, validation checks, rollback strategy, and operator runbook for self-host deployments.
close_reason: Added deterministic JSON-to-SQLite migration + rollback runbook with idempotent backfill order, validation gates, and operator checklist.

title: Create deterministic financial fixtures for parity and E2E
description: Define fixture datasets covering accounts, categories, transactions, recurring rules, and investments. Ensure repeatable seeds for local dev, CI, and Playwright parity tests.

title: Test: enforce test-first rule for frontend refactor tasks
description: Add repository checks/tests that fail when frontend refactor changes are introduced without associated or updated tests (unit/component/e2e as appropriate). This can be implemented as a CI validation script or lint-style guard with clear failure messaging.
close_reason: Added frontend test-first guard check and dedicated guard unit tests.

title: Support emoji for expense categories
description: Add emoji support for categories so category definitions can include an emoji and UI surfaces render it consistently where categories are shown.
acceptance_criteria: Users can assign/store category emojis and category selectors, labels, and visual summaries render emoji correctly without breaking existing category behavior.
close_reason: Implemented coarse/granular category strategy, Auto/Jeep/Honda handling, transaction-processing integration, visualization updates, and emoji category support with tests.

title: Fix low-contrast text colors in table and input elements
description: Apply Tailwind-based color token/class updates so text in table and input elements is clearly readable across default, hover, disabled, and focus states. Keep implementation in .tsx and Tailwind-only styling per project rules. Acceptance: tests from minance2-6ej are present and passing.
close_reason: Improved table/input readability and focus contrast in transactions/import pages with Tailwind-only class updates; new contrast spec passes.

title: Implement JSON->SQLite cutover artifacts (schema + migrator + validator scripts)
description: Implement the concrete artifacts defined in docs/json-to-sqlite-migration-runbook.md: services/api/sql/schema.sql, scripts/migrate-json-to-sqlite.mjs, and scripts/validate-json-vs-sqlite.mjs. The implementation must support idempotent reruns, emit migration/validation summaries, and fail fast on parity mismatches before cutover.

title: Add E2E coverage for positive-expense CSV direction inference
close_reason: Added positive-expense CSV fixture and E2E direction-inference coverage
